name: project-memory
description: Keep project context when work moves from one AI coding agent to another.

interface.shortDescription: Switch agents without losing project context.
interface.longDescription: Keeps decisions, progress, completed work, removals, and next steps in the repository so the next agent can continue where the last one stopped.
defaultPrompt: Initialize Project Memory before we begin.
Resume this project from its accepted context.
Prepare a governed handoff for the next agent.
